title: Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
